claims.statement: The public repository had no tracked GitHub workflows or deterministic governance contract before this change.
The root quality check runs lint, type-check, and tests but does not run workspace builds.
The default branch had no branch protection or repository ruleset at bootstrap.
Binding decisions, mechanisms, and evidence to a canonical planHash will make stale evidence and governance drift mechanically detectable.
A repo-local TypeScript host is sufficient until repeated use demonstrates a stable public package boundary.
Whether the governance host should later become a reusable package outside OverlayKit.

successCriteria.statement: The same semantic contract compiles to the same planHash regardless of input ordering.
An enforced gate without a real registered mechanism fails closed.
Editing or deleting a previously manifested decision or change is detected.
successCriteria.verification: Automated manifest immutability test and base-ref verification.

successCriteria.statement: Evidence for another plan or manifest is stale and evidence that redefines a gate is invalid.
CI runs governance validation, quality checks, builds, and emits an evidence run.
successCriteria.verification: GitHub Actions workflow inspection and successful check runs.

successCriteria.statement: Invoker delegation and gate producer provenance must match the compiled profile and mechanism.
successCriteria.verification: Automated identity and producer mismatch tests.

definitionOfDone.statement: Governance host lint, type-check, tests, compilation, and verification pass.
The full monorepo quality suite and builds pass.
definitionOfDone.evidence: npm run check && npm run build

definitionOfDone.statement: plan.json and manifest.json match deterministic compilation.
A current governance run records gate outcomes and enforced artifacts.
